name: ocak
description: Ocak session tracking hooks for Claude Code

hooks.command: bash -c '[ -z "$OCAK_SESSION_ID" ] && exit 0; curl -sf -X POST http://localhost:27832/hook -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Ocak-Session: $OCAK_SESSION_ID" -d @- || true'
